description: The future of Social in the age of AI

description: Canva for short-form video ads

name: AmpMe
description: Developer of a music application designed to synchronize multiple audio devices together to play the music louder. The company's application offers syncing and Bluetooth functions that facilitate a seamless connection between portable speakers and smartphones, enabling customers to synchronize their phones and create a portable sound system.

name: Audiodraft
description: Developer of an online audio branding platform designed to outsource audio productions to a network of musicians and sound designers. The company's platform offers custom-made music and sound design for television commercials, theme music for mobile games, and audio logos for companies, enabling clients to create open sound design contests, where sound designers compete and audio content can be bought for various media use.

name: Beatdapp
description: Operator of a SaaS-based platform intended to help music labels and artists track their songs to collect royalties. The company's tracking system authenticates, verifies, and validates media streamed in real-time and reduces the tracking discrepancies between Digital Service Providers (DSPs) and rights holders, enabling DSPs to increase their royalty revenue for rights holders while limiting legal exposure to royalty lawsuits.

name: Canva
description: Operator of an online graphic design platform intended to democratize access to design and visual communication. The company's platform offers drag-and-drop features and professional layouts to consistently design graphics through a vast collection of professionally designed layouts to personalize the design with a stock library of photographs, illustrations and imagery, enabling companies and users to design presentations, and social media graphics with appropriate layouts.

name: Nexus AI
description: Operator of an online marketplace platform designed to connect enterprises with the world's leading creative talents. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence to pair creative professionals and provides agency-quality marketing material, enabling enterprises to build teams, manage human capital, and predict future performance.

name: Creopop
description: Developer of a three-dimensional (3D) printing pen designed to bring drawings to life without the risk of heating or melting. The company's pen is battery-operated and charged through a mini universal serial bus (USB), it uses light-sensitive ink called photopolymers that is immediately solidified by light-emitting diodes (LED) surrounding the nozzle of the pen when a button is pressed, enabling children and artists to draw their vision in three-dimension (3D).

name: DayDayCook
description: DDC Enterprise Ltd is a content driven consumer brand offering easy, convenient ready-to-heat , ready-to-cook and plant-based meal products i.e. meal products consisting largely or solely of vegetables, fruits, grains and other foods derived from plant-based protein, rather than animal protein) while promoting healthier lifestyle choices to Millennial and Generation Z customer-base. It is also engaged in the provision of advertising services and the operation of experience stores to offer cooking classes.

name: DIVE studios
description: Developer of an online podcasting application intended to entertain listeners with diverse creators and communities. The company's application offers several kinds of podcasts for all age groups with diverse creators that empower communities and positively impact culture and society through unique audio experiences, enabling customers to gain knowledge while being entertained.

name: Egab
description: Operator of a digital media platform intended to empower local journalists. The company platform creates profiles, publishes news, articles and stories in regional and international media outlets, enabling local journalists and media outlets to publish inspiring stories for global audiences.

name: EnerGaia
description: Producer of algae products intended to provide a clean, healthy, and sustainable food source. The company offers a wide range of Spirulina-based products ranging from fresh powder, energy balls, and pasta, enabling consumers to get fresh and sustainable algae products.

name: Fitzy
description: Operator of an open internet TV platform designed to watch and record internet TV channel that supports online streaming in a single user interface on Smart TV device. The company's web crawler scans the internet for the best channels, enabling users to unlock paid content with their subscription services and enjoy a selection of free internet television.

name: Graphiq
description: Developer of a graphic designing platform intended to help clients to get their creative projects done. The company's portal connects quality graphic designers who can create websites, presentations, logos, marketing materials, or animations with businesses, enabling clients to hire freelance graphic designers for their projects.

name: Hooked
description: Developer of a mobile media company intended to provide movies and shows to consumers. The company's proprietary technology uses artificial intelligence to predict hits based on billions of data points that are tracked at each step of the content development funnel, enabling viewers to get trending content.

name: Infonesia
description: Developer of a knowledge-sharing platform designed to offer new experiences. The company's platform allows users to become creative question askers, share information and entertainment with a shout-out and get quick responses to their queries, enabling knowledge seekers and sharers to give and receive knowledge and earn income in the process.

name: Já Entendi
description: Provider of educational services intended to cater to the needs of blue-collar workers. The company's services include online professional training and capacity building the company through video classes with an exclusive methodology for workers at the base of the pyramid that helps to leverage blue-collar workers transforming content like books, booklets and manuals into video lessons, enabling workers with skilled knowledge in various fields to work efficiently.

name: Shekar
description: Operator of an entertainment and media platform intended to create and share viral Korean pop culture content in English. The company's platform creates shareable content with Korean music, dramas, movies, celebrities, fashion, culture, and more, enabling fans to follow their favorite music and entertainment from the performers.

name: Kyndoo
description: Developer of an online platform intended for social Influencers to professionalize their business. The company's platform provides data, tools, payment protections, profile builder tools and business consulting services, enabling social Influencers to have an authentic identity towards the public, build a profitable business, provide brands with data and filter out the fake Influencers on social media.

name: MojiLala
description: Developer of an augmented reality application designed for video creation with augmented reality characters. The company's software offers unique and creative AR objects that can be embedded in videos and then shared on various social media platforms, enabling users to express themselves and bring life to the environment around them.

name: Lucid Software
description: Developer of collaborative diagramming and brand management software designed to improve clarity, communication, and productivity. The company's platform includes tools to create flowcharts, mind maps, organizational charts, website wireframes, and network diagrams or design and share other visual content, enabling businesses to share and maximize the impact of visuals or visual content while driving clarity and gaining insights.

name: Maestro
description: Operator of a white-label platform intended to help enterprise live streamers own, engage, and monetize audiences. The company's live and on-demand video streaming platform provides interactive video channels with two-way communication for personalized experiences, enabling content creators and brand sponsors to engage and monetize audiences at a large scale.

name: Mars Reel
description: Operator of an online sports-focused media platform intended to provide news coverage of sports athletes and teams in high school hoops. The company's platform offer viewers with short highlight videos and cool music delivered to their mobile devices, enabling users to discover all the latest international sports news and videos under one website.

name: Nikahsatu
description: Operator of Malaysia’s largest wedding venue network, offering affordable full-service wedding packages that include venues, catering, photography, décor, and stationery. Nikahsatu provides a one-stop platform that simplifies wedding planning for modern couples, supported by strong social media reach and data-driven marketing.

name: PaceMaker
description: Developer of a music mixing tool designed to help mix music using artificial intelligence. The company's artificial intelligence technology based application, enables users to create and monetize DJ mixes using licensed streams from Spotify and other music stream apps.

name: PG Studios
description: Provider of content production and broadcasting services intended to produce content in multi-languages for multi-platforms. The company's services specialize in the making of animation artworks in both two-dimensional and three-dimensional environments with quality standards, enabling viewers to have creative, innovative, and profitable animated entertainment experiences.

name: Pic Collage
description: Developer of a mobile photo application designed to let users combine images, text, and stickers as freeform collages and share them amongst themselves. The company's application lets users search the internet from within the application to find photos, videos, and other images for photo collages in fun and novel ways, enabling users to combine photos, videos, captions, stickers, and special effects to create unique collages and images that they can share with friends.

name: Pixc
description: Developer of image editing software designed to turn product images into edited versions that help to increase the online sales of the products. The company's software uses high-definition image editing technology that eases the process of background removal of the product images and highlights the product in front of customers, enabling store owners to attract customers and increase revenue.

name: Podcorn
description: Operator of a self-service marketplace intended for podcast sponsorships.

name: Publishizer
description: Operator of a crowdfunding literary agency intended for authors and publishers. The company's platform connects authors with publishers and acquisitions editors through data and pre-order campaigns, enabling authors to pre-sell copies of their unpublished books and get pitching for the book to publishers and deal negotiation.

name: Scopio, Scopio LLC
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based user-generated content platform designed to find and license images and videos from social media. The company's platform streamlines the copyright process for user-generated images and videos on social media, enabling users to seamlessly search, license, publish and pull insights from user-generated images and videos.

name: Silkroad Images
description: Operator of stock photography and editorial content library intended to capture, accurately portray and disseminate the culture and traditions of the Middle East and beyond. The company's library offers photographic images and digital content such as vectors, sound effects, VAS images, and editorials segmented into multiple categories and sourced from experienced photographers, enabling clients to enjoy authentic oriental Middle East-focused photographs and videos.

name: Slidebean
description: Developer of a presentation-building platform intended to simplify the process of making presentations. The company's platform utilizes artificial intelligence-powered online presentation tools to separate content from design and provides a fill-in-the-blank outline to create presentation workflows, enabling users to make a presentation by simply inputting information, regardless of their technical expertise or design skills.

name: Storia Originals
description: Developer of digital content software designed to create an immersive storytelling experience. The company's software is designed for writers and animators to create original content, with features like genre filters and length recommendations for writers and animation style flexibility for animators, enabling readers and watchers to engage with stories in a new way.

name: Thematic
description: Developer of a music licensing platform designed to empower music artists and content creators. The company's platform matches content creators on digital platforms with established and aspiring musicians, enabling artists to feature their music in online videos without the worry of copyright infringement.

name: The Ticket Fairy
description: Ticket Fairy is Salesforce meets Eventbrite - AI-enabled vertical SaaS for events and venues that skyrockets their revenues and accelerates their path to profitability!

name: Tapshots
description: Developer of a video production application designed to capture and share videos. The company's application offers video shooting and editing with a diverse range of filters and effects using iPhone, iPad, iPod touch, and Android devices, enabling customers to record every special moment of life in a special way.

name: VoyceMe
description: Developer a social creator platform designed to allow social interaction among fans and authors. The company offers original manga, webcomics, and web novels, by giving historically underserved creators new ways to tell their stories, generate revenue, and engage with their fans, enabling readers to find new stories and the ability to experience them through immersive storytelling and helping authors monetize their stories and build and engage their fan base.

name: Wideo
description: Developer of an online animated video creation platform designed to empower people to create professional online videos. The company's platform provides flexibility beyond templates and themes and offers a selection of templates that can be customized to deliver a message or create one from scratch, enabling users to create, edit and share unique professional videos in order to elevate their online marketing strategy faster and easier.

name: Storytree
description: Developer of an app designed to make it easy to create photo books. The company's app allows users to pick photos from their mobile phones, cloud storage, and social media and place them in the desired format for printing, helping users create beautiful photo gifts, keepsakes, and custom scrapbooks in minutes.

name: RestAR
description: Developer of a cloud-based 3D scanning and AR technology intended to convert physical products into the content. The company's software combines both computer vision and deep learning algorithms based on cutting-edge academic research where owners to scan and render high-quality 3D content based on physical products in e-commerce and food markets using a mobile device, enabling business to enhance the consumers' overall experience.

name: Pop Up Archive
description: Provider of a search engine for digital media. The company provides a platform which takes sound from anywhere and automatically creates timestamped transcripts and keywords, indexed so that users can play back search terms.

name: Khush
description: Developer of music applications for mobile phones. The company's application analyzes the user's voice and composes music to match.

name: Zya
description: Developer of a mobile based music creation software designed to democratize music creation and expression through imaginative games and apps. The company's Ditty application offers a technology platform that powers musical communication across a range of products and integrations with global companies enabling users to personalize their video, music, and message and collaborate with artists on a variety of platforms including web portals, mobile devices and gaming consoles.

name: Makerbot
description: Provider of desktop Three-dimensional(3D) printing technology. The company manufactures Three-dimensional(3D) desktop printers and components, as well as providing the MakerBot 3D Ecosystem, an online platform of 3D printing tools, including Thingiverse, a crowdsourced collection of downloadable digital designs.

name: Lumific
description: Developer of a web and mobile-based application for editing photos. The company's application automatically sorts and edits photos stored in the cloud and on mobile device.

name: GraphCast
description: Provider of a platform that connects creators of infographic content with audiences and publishers. The company's platform connects designers, journalists, animators and developers with clients, featuring cloud-based collaboration tools to enable content delivery.

name: SoundBetter
description: Developer of an online music production marketplace designed to offer platform for recording studios, mixing and mastering engineers and producers and session musicians. The company's online music production marketplace helps to find and securely hire the right pro based on specialty, budget, genre, credits, reviews and sound samples, enabling musicians worldwide to connect and hire top music pros so they can get to great-sounding release-ready songs.

name: PICT
description: Provider of technology platform that converts photos into storefronts. The company provides a Web and mobile application to create shoppable, trackable photos, and operates a Web-content bank enabling brands to release monetizable images directly to publishers.

name: 9Slides
description: Provider of a cloud based presentation platform. The company delivers mobile technology for employees to watch video presentations, answer quizzes to test their knowledge, and to create their own presentations to share. The company also provides real-time analytics to employers on completion rates and comprehension.

name: Forrst
description: Provider of online community for website developers and designers. The company offers its community to help themselves and others get better at their craft by providing critiques and sharing their knowledge to build applications and websites.

name: Stupeflix
description: Developer of mobile-based application designed to edit videos. The company's mobile-based application offers multimedia editing platform that allows to select video clips and combine them into a single film complete with transitions and music, enabling people and developers to make travel movies, wedding videos, promo ads and property virtual tours.

name: Zencoder
description: Provider of cloud-based video encoding software. The company provides web-based video encoding software as a service, designed to convert any video into web and mobile compatible formats. It is for web sites and applications that accept uploaded videos and need to encode them to standard formats.

name: Shakr Media
description: Provider of a video making platform designed to connect businesses of all sizes with success in the video first world. The company's platform offers over 2,000 video designs made by professional video designers and proprietary video editing & rendering technology to promote video ads on Facebook and Instagram, enabling anyone to make visually stunning and ROI generating video ads in minutes.

name: Viki
description: Provider of online video services. The company provides a platform for streaming premium TV shows and movies, as well as crowdsourcing subtitles in more than 160 languages.

name: TT Labs
description: Developer of video platform for online retailers. The company's video platform utilizes the SaaS platform for adding videos online to communicate and sell via online product videos, enabling retailers, gaming companies and individuals to hire the video professionals at a range of price points, to fit any budget and make trailers, using in-game footage or product videos and air the same on national TV.

name: ChromaOm
description: Provider of an online marketplace intended to sell digital content. The company's online marketplace helps people to bring their creative projects to life with ready-to-use design assets like fonts, graphics, photos and more from independent creators around the world, enabling designers and design content producers to buy and sell their works across the web.

name: Vidcaster
description: Developer of an online video platform and video site creator for video producers. The company offers an application platform that enables users to create, manage and share online videos.

name: Hipster
description: Provider of a web platform for answering questions and queries of users. The company provides social networking services.

name: Breaker
description: Tokyo-based social media branding agency connecting the world to Japan.
